description: Notifications — Event accumulation, daily digest, notification UI

tasks.title: Notification Service — Docker container
tasks.prompt:
Implement the Notification Service (M3.5) as specified in SNAPP-TRD.md WU-3.5.

Create Snapp.Service.Notification with:

1. Endpoints:
   GET /api/notif — list user notifications (newest first, paginated, includes UnreadCount)
   POST /api/notif/{notifId}/read — mark single notification read
   POST /api/notif/read-all — mark all read
   GET /api/notif/preferences — get digest preferences (or defaults)
   PUT /api/notif/preferences — save preferences (DigestTime HH:mm, Timezone IANA, ImmediateTypes list)

2. Internal notification creation: other services write NOTIF# items directly to snapp-notif table. This service reads them. Create a shared helper in Snapp.Shared/Hosting/NotificationHelper.cs that other services can use to write notification items consistently.

3. Preferences: stored in snapp-users (NOTIF_PREFS item). Digest queue bucket: DQUEUE#{digestHour} entries for scheduled processing.

4. Immediate delivery: if notification type is in user's ImmediateTypes, decrypt user email from snapp-users PII and send immediately via SMTP.

Dockerfile + docker-compose (snapp-notification, port 8087). Kong route: /api/notif/* (JWT required).

Integration tests: create notification items directly in DynamoDB, verify GET returns them, mark read works, preferences save/load, immediate notification sends email to Papercut.
tasks.done_when: Notification service runs in Docker. CRUD works. Immediate notifications send via Papercut. Preferences stored. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Notification Digest Job
tasks.prompt:
Implement the Digest Job (M3.6) as specified in SNAPP-TRD.md WU-3.6.

Create Snapp.Service.DigestJob as a console app / scheduled job:

1. Runs hourly (cron: 0 * * * *). Processes users whose digest is due for the current UTC hour.
2. Query DQUEUE#{currentHourUTC} → list of userIds
3. For each user: query undigested notifications (IsDigested=false), skip if none
4. Group by Category (Referrals, Discussions, Network, Intelligence)
5. Render HTML email using Razor template (Templates/DigestEmail.cshtml): header, per-category sections, deep links, footer
6. Decrypt user email from snapp-users PII
7. Send via SMTP
8. Mark all included notifications as IsDigested=true
9. Record DIGEST# sent item

Error handling: failed email send → do NOT mark as digested (retry next day). Process users in parallel (batch of 10).

Add to docker-compose as a one-shot service (or with a simple cron wrapper).

Integration test: create user with digest preferences, create notification items, run digest job, verify email in Papercut contains all notifications grouped by category, verify items marked as digested.
tasks.done_when: Digest job runs, groups notifications, renders email, sends to Papercut, marks as digested. Integration test passes.

tasks.title: Notification UI
tasks.prompt:
Implement notification UI using MudBlazor as specified in SNAPP-TRD.md WU-3.7.

1. Components/Layout/NotificationBell.razor (in MudAppBar):
   - MudIconButton with MudBadge showing unread count
   - Polls GET /api/notif?limit=1 every 60s for UnreadCount
   - Click toggles NotificationDrawer

2. Components/Layout/NotificationDrawer.razor:
   - MudDrawer Anchor=End (slides from right)
   - MudList of recent notifications, newest first
   - Each: MudIcon (by type), MudText title, MudText body preview, relative timestamp
   - Unread: MudListItem with bold text / MudBadge dot
   - Click → mark read + NavigateTo source entity
   - MudButton 'Mark All Read' at top
   - MudLink 'Digest Preferences' at bottom

3. Pages/Notification/Preferences.razor (/notifications/preferences or within user settings):
   - MudTimePicker for DigestTime (default 07:00)
   - MudSelect for Timezone (auto-detect from browser, list of IANA zones)
   - Per-type MudSwitch toggles: 'Notify immediately for:' — ReferralReceived, MentionInDiscussion, ApplicationDecision, ValuationChanged (all default OFF)
   - MudButton Save → PUT /api/notif/preferences

4. bUnit tests.
tasks.done_when: Notification bell shows count. Drawer lists notifications. Mark read works. Preferences page saves. bUnit tests pass.

tasks.title: Sprint 5 integration validation
tasks.prompt: Validate Sprint 5. Run all tests. Walkthrough: trigger notifications (create post with @mention, apply to network), verify they appear in notification drawer, run digest job manually, verify digest email in Papercut with correct grouping. Write .claude/reports/sprint-5-validation.md.
tasks.done_when: All tests pass. Notifications and digest working. Validation report written.
